lesson.title: PERSUASIVE WRITING
topics:  Overview: Persuasive writing is a form of writing where the writer attempts to
convince or persuade the audience to adopt a particular point of view or take a specific
action by presenting logical reasoning, supporting evidence, and compelling arguments.
It has the goal of influencing the reader to adopt a certain opinion, ideas or complete an

assessment:  Learners read a model discursive essay and discuss its features.
 Learners to write a discursive essay using appropriate language.
 Discursive Composition explores both sides of a topic and draws a conclusion.
 It could express opposing opinions, cause and effect, compare and contrast, problem
and solution, advantages and disadvantages or just exploratory.
